use std::io::Write;

fn build_report(records: &[Record]) -> String {
    let mut output = Vec::new();
    for record in records {
        // GOOD: write directly to output, no temporary String allocation
        write!(output, "{}: {} ({})\n", record.id, record.name, record.value).unwrap();
    }
    String::from_utf8(output).unwrap()
}

struct Record {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    value: f64,
}
